query:
-- Insert default system roles
INSERT INTO systemRoles (code, name, nameAr, description, level, isSystem) VALUES
('super_admin', 'Super Admin', 'مدير النظام الأعلى', 'Full system access - Technical team only', 0, TRUE),
('admin', 'Administrator', 'مدير', 'System administration - Technology in-charge', 1, TRUE),
('security_manager', 'Security Manager', 'مدير الأمن', 'Manages security operations across sites', 2, TRUE),
('site_manager', 'Site Manager', 'مدير الموقع', 'Manages operations at a specific site', 2, TRUE),
('security_officer', 'Security Officer', 'ضابط الأمن', 'Handles day-to-day security operations', 3, TRUE),
('account_manager', 'Account Manager', 'مدير الحساب', 'Manages client/contractor relationships', 3, TRUE),
('approver', 'Approver', 'معتمد', 'Can approve requests within their scope', 4, TRUE),
('requestor', 'Requestor', 'مقدم الطلب', 'Can create and track their own requests', 5, TRUE),
('viewer', 'Viewer', 'مشاهد', 'Read-only access to assigned areas', 6, TRUE)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
